title: SQL feature missing
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO c (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE TABLE d (id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES c(id));
INSERT INTO d (id, description) VALUES (1, 'Description for Alice');
SELECT * FROM c LEFT JOIN d ON c.id = d.id WHERE c.age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with missing SQL feature
